superstarBaseballBeginnerGuide.title: Superstar Baseball Beginner Guide
superstarBaseballBeginnerGuide.subtitle: How to Start Playing Superstar Baseball
superstarBaseballBeginnerGuide.intro: Superstar Baseball is a Roblox sports game by Metavision. New players begin by rolling styles, learning the three core on-field roles, and getting comfortable with the pitch mix before focusing on optimization.

steps.title: Enter the Game
steps.description: Search for Superstar Baseball on Roblox and join a server. The early experience is built around learning your style setup and basic match flow.

steps.title: Use Your Starting Spins
steps.description: New players begin with 4 free spins. These are used to roll one offensive style and one defensive style.

steps.title: Understand Spin Odds
steps.description: A free spin is granted every 30 minutes. Reported style odds are Legendary 0.5%, Epic 2%, Rare 35%, and Uncommon 62.5%.

steps.title: Learn the Three Roles
steps.description: Fielder catches the ball and throws for outs. Pitcher tries to miss bats or force weak contact. Batter aims to clear the infield and bring runners home.

steps.title: Know the Main Pitch Types
steps.description: Curveball runs about 65-85 mph, Sinker about 70-90 mph, Slider about 75-90 mph, and Fastball about 80-100 mph.

steps.title: Focus on Simple Early Wins
steps.description: Start by learning swing timing, recognizing pitch speed, making clean throws as a fielder, and saving better resources for stronger roster upgrades.

quickTips: A free spin resets every 30 minutes — collect it consistently.
Start with any role to learn the basics before specializing.
Fastballs arrive fastest, so react earlier than you think.
Save Lucky Spins for higher rarity style targets.

superstarBaseballControls.title: Superstar Baseball PC Controls
superstarBaseballControls.subtitle: Superstar Baseball Controls Quick Reference
superstarBaseballControls.intro: The control set in Superstar Baseball is compact, but each role uses inputs differently. Batters need fast reaction timing, pitchers need quick pitch selection, and fielders need clean dives and throws.

controls.description: Use this to hit the ball at the plate.
Chooses Curveball as the current pitch.
Chooses Sinker as the current pitch.
Chooses Slider as the current pitch.
Chooses Fastball as the current pitch.
Dive to try to secure catches and save hits.
Throw after fielding the ball and line up the green arrow with the target teammate.

superstarBaseballBattingGuide.title: Superstar Baseball Batting Guide
superstarBaseballBattingGuide.subtitle: Hit More Consistently at the Plate
superstarBaseballBattingGuide.intro: Batting in Superstar Baseball is built around reading the ball early and syncing your swing to the pitch path. Better hitters identify pitch type, wait for the right zone, and avoid wasting swings on bad balls.

steps.title: Time Your Swing Mid-Flight
steps.description: Start the swing when the ball is about halfway to the plate. Swinging too early often produces fouls, while swinging too late leads to whiffs.

steps.title: Read the Pitch Type Early
steps.description: Fastballs travel straight and need an earlier reaction. Curves break later and usually need more patience. Off-speed pitches look fast at first but arrive later.

steps.title: Aim Center-High for Power
steps.description: For stronger launch angle and home run contact, the center-high zone is the most useful target. Repeated grounders usually mean the swing is late or the contact point is too low.

steps.title: Do Not Swing at Everything
steps.description: Plate discipline matters. Letting bad pitches pass can put you on base with a walk and forces pitchers to throw more hittable balls.

steps.title: Build Around Your Best Hitter
steps.description: Slot your strongest hitter into the 3rd or 4th batting position, where RBI chances show up more often.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Common questions about Superstar Baseball on Roblox

questions.question: What is Superstar Baseball?
questions.answer: Superstar Baseball is an anime-inspired 7v7 competitive baseball game on Roblox by Metavision. Players choose offensive and defensive styles, compete in fast-paced matches, and earn Spins and Coins as rewards.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in Superstar Baseball?
questions.answer: Open Superstar Baseball, tap the settings menu, scroll to the bottom, paste a code into the redemption box, and press Enter to claim your reward.

questions.question: What are Spins in Superstar Baseball?
questions.answer: Spins are the primary resource for rolling new styles in Superstar Baseball. A free spin is available every 30 minutes. Lucky Spins increase the chance of receiving rare or legendary styles.

questions.question: What are the three roles in Superstar Baseball?
questions.answer: The three roles are Batter, Pitcher, and Fielder. Batters aim to make contact and score runs. Pitchers try to generate strikeouts or weak contact. Fielders catch the ball and make throws to record outs.

questions.question: How do I get more Spins in Superstar Baseball?
questions.answer: Spins can be earned by redeeming active codes, collecting the free spin that resets every 30 minutes, or purchasing them in the in-game store.

questions.question: Where can I play Superstar Baseball?
questions.answer: Superstar Baseball is available on Roblox for free. Search for Superstar Baseball on the Roblox platform or visit the official game page to start playing.

batting.whatIsDescription: Batting in Superstar Baseball requires reading pitch types, timing your swing mid-flight, and targeting the center-high contact zone for maximum power.

whySteps.step2Description: Improve your ability to drive in runners and win close matches

pitching.whatIsDescription: Pitching in Superstar Baseball involves selecting from four pitch types and varying speed and location to generate strikeouts, weak contact, and outs.

whySteps.step1Description: Mix pitch types and speeds to keep batters off balance
whySteps.step2Description: Strong pitching prevents runs and gives your team a chance to win
whySteps.step3Description: Learn when to throw off-speed versus fastball based on batter tendencies

fielding.whatIsDescription: Fielding in Superstar Baseball requires catching fly balls, executing timely throws, diving for difficult catches, and coordinating with teammates to record outs.

whySteps.step1Description: Strong fielding stops runners from advancing and scoring extra runs
whySteps.step2Description: Precise throwing and coordination turns more balls in play into outs
whySteps.step3Description: Use the E key to dive for balls that would otherwise reach the outfield
